creator: jimmy@mammothcheese.ca
text:
Created attachment 157723
patch

Added: -c option to drood to prevent cross-origin sharing of static 
       resources other than .html and .tar.gz.
Added: Humdinger refuses to serve static resources other than .html to
       cross-origin requests.
Added: Humdinger now propagates HTTP_ORIGIN to SCGI servers.
Added: Drood now propagates HTTP_REFERRER and HTTP_ORIGIN to SCGI servers.
